All surroundings indicate that con-
ditions are particularly well adapted
for carrying on an extensive mining
business. The claim at Iron noun
tain is at present lying idle, although
500 tons OF ore are on the dump
awaiting transportation. The ore is
principally copper and silver. the cop
per running about . per cent, or s27,
